Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The more time you {f 0 1 2}spend with each of your Social Links{f 0 1 27}, the deeper your relationships will grow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The level of intimacy you have with each person will unlock certain benefits. Depending on the rank, you will receive bonus experience when you fuse Personas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Deepening your relationships with your current Social Links {f 0 1 2}may lead to the discovery of new ones{f 0 1 27}. Try to form as many as you can.[n]{f 1 1}
